name: Stephen A The Hon Womack
stanceSummary: Womack has argued that the U.S. should stand firmly with Israel, framed Hamas as a terrorist enemy, and highlighted his votes for pro-Israel aid and anti-Hamas resolutions.

timeline.event: Following Netanyahu's congressional address, Womack said the U.S. must stand firmly with Israel in its fight against terrorists and cited votes supporting Israel aid and anti-Hamas measures.
